idea-plugin.name: MarkTone
idea-plugin.description:
MarkTone automatically generates and applies Markdown preview styles that match your current IDE theme.

Features

  • Extracts colors and fonts from your active IDE theme
  • Generates a complete Markdown preview stylesheet with proper typography
  • Auto-syncs styles when you switch themes — no manual CSS editing needed
  • Two rendering profiles: Exact Match (tight, code-like) and Readable Docs (spacious, doc-friendly)
  • Optional custom CSS overrides for further tweaking

How it works

MarkTone reads your current editor colors, font family, and font size, then composes a Markdown-specific stylesheet using CSS custom properties. The result is applied directly to the Markdown preview panel.

Requirements

  • JetBrains IDE 2024.2 or later
  • Markdown plugin (bundled with most JetBrains IDEs)
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial release
  • Theme extraction and CSS token generation
  • Markdown preview auto-sync on theme changes
  • Exact Match and Readable Docs rendering profiles
  • Settings panel under Tools > MarkTone
  • Custom CSS overrides support
